messages.content: {"claims":[{"source":"src-obs","text":"Emitting one trace event per agent step lets teams reconstruct any run end to end."},{"source":"src-obs","text":"Per-step tracing is the biggest lever on mean-time-to-diagnose for agent incidents."},{"source":"src-eval","text":"A regression gate that blocks releases below an eval pass-rate threshold catches prompt drift."},{"source":"src-eval","text":"Treating the golden set as a unit test for the agent surfaces defects before they ship."},{"source":"src-cost","text":"Attributing token usage per agent role makes runaway orchestrator loops visible in the bill."},{"source":"src-cost","text":"A per-role token budget is the cheapest cost guardrail and the first to pay off."},{"source":"src-trust","text":"A groundedness check rejects any synthesized claim that lacks a source reference."},{"source":"src-trust","text":"Requiring a citation per claim stops the agent from asserting facts it cannot cite."}],"themes":[{"claim_indexes":[0,1],"name":"Observability"},{"claim_indexes":[2,3],"name":"Evaluation"},{"claim_indexes":[4,5],"name":"Cost"},{"claim_indexes":[6,7],"name":"Trust"}]}

request.system: You are the research orchestrator writing the final synthesis. For each theme, write one synthesized claim and cite the source ids it draws on. Reply with ONLY a JSON object {"answer": str, "claims": [{"text": str, "sources": [str]}]}. Every synthesized claim MUST cite at least one source id. Never assert a claim you cannot cite.

response.content: {"answer":"Reliable production agents rest on four load-bearing practices: per-step observability, evaluation gates, per-role cost attribution, and a groundedness check on every claim.","claims":[{"sources":["src-obs"],"text":"Observability: Emitting one trace event per agent step lets teams reconstruct any run end to end."},{"sources":["src-obs"],"text":"Observability: Per-step tracing is the biggest lever on mean-time-to-diagnose for agent incidents."},{"sources":["src-eval"],"text":"Evaluation: A regression gate that blocks releases below an eval pass-rate threshold catches prompt drift."},{"sources":["src-eval"],"text":"Evaluation: Treating the golden set as a unit test for the agent surfaces defects before they ship."},{"sources":["src-cost"],"text":"Cost: Attributing token usage per agent role makes runaway orchestrator loops visible in the bill."},{"sources":["src-cost"],"text":"Cost: A per-role token budget is the cheapest cost guardrail and the first to pay off."},{"sources":["src-trust"],"text":"Trust: A groundedness check rejects any synthesized claim that lacks a source reference."},{"sources":["src-trust"],"text":"Trust: Requiring a citation per claim stops the agent from asserting facts it cannot cite."}]}
